block_00: Take a look at the top news of the week
block_03: All the largest cryptocurrencies were up during morning trading on Wednesday, with Ethereum seeing the most significant change, climbing 8.19% to $1,492.00. Total crypto market capitalization increased 6.4% – one of the most significant gains recently.
block_07: Solar stocks surge after senator Manchin throws support behind the energy bill. The package earmarks a record $369 billion for climate and clean energy provisions. The share price has increased by 22% this week.
block_10: The company has announced the Snapchat Sounds Creator Fund: the fund designed to support emerging and independent artists. Despite this, the share price continues to fall amid Q2 Earnings Report – minus 40% this week
